name: GOLFTEC Southwest Austin
address: 5716 W US Hwy 290 Service Rd Suite 101, Austin, TX 78735
about: GOLFTEC Southwest Austin is a golf training and club fitting center specializing in data-driven instruction and practice. The facility utilizes advanced technology including OPTIMOTION motion capture, high-speed video analysis, and launch monitors to provide detailed swing feedback and personalized coaching. Services include private lessons, on-course playing lessons, club fittings, and practice memberships with a focus on measurable improvement for golfers of all skill levels.
why_golfers_like_it: Data-driven instruction using advanced motion tracking technology
Indoor training with launch monitors for instant feedback on club speed, ball speed, and spin rates
Certified PGA coaches with a focus on creating personalized game plans for lasting improvement
Comprehensive club fitting services with 21-yard average increase in driving distance

simulator_hardware.notes: Launch monitor used for fitting lessons to measure ball flight, club path, and impact conditions

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: GOLFTEC provides all necessary clubs for lessons and fittings. You can also purchase custom-fit clubs directly from their pro shop.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: There is no mention of a cafe or food service at this location, making it likely a BYOB facility or no food/drinks allowed in the training areas.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: As a training facility focused on lessons and practice rather than full simulator play, typical session times are 45-60 minutes per lesson rather than full rounds.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, GOLFTEC offers junior programs and uses technology like video analysis and launch monitors to help juniors see and understand their progress.
